title: Trump Extends Sanctions Exemption on Some Russian Oil as High Gas Prices Persist
summary_full: The Trump administration made the announcement hours after Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial ships, though the status of the waterway remained uncertain.
summary_public: The Trump administration made the announcement hours after Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial ships, though the status of the waterway remained uncertain.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was open
